results.title: While storms wash out some area events, Savannah Bananas deliver in Kinnick debut
Explained! Why England players could use viagra ahead of FIFA World Cup clash vs Mexico
results.description: England players could legally use Viagra to help combat the effects of Mexico City’s high altitude ahead of their FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 clash against co-hosts Mexico. Although there is no indication the squad intends to use the medication, Viagra is not banned by the World Anti-Doping Agency (WADA).

results.title: Outsourced Staff Gherao VC Office at Rajendra University Over Layoffs
results.description: #ଭ ିସିଙ୍କୁ_ଘେରିଲେ_ଆଉଟସୋର୍ସିଙ୍ଗ_କର୍ମଚାରୀ ବଲାଙ୍ଗିର ରାଜେନ୍ଦ୍ର ୟୁନିଭରସିଟିରେ ଉତ୍ତେଜନା | ଭିସିଙ୍କ ଅଫିସ ଘେରିଛନ୍ତି ଆଉଟସୋର୍ସିଙ୍ଗ କର୍ମଚାରୀ | ହଠାତ ୮୨ ଜଣ କର୍ମଚାରୀଙ୍କୁ ଛଟେଇ ନେଇ ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇଛି। ଯାହା ଫଳରେ କର୍ମଚାରୀ ମାନେ ଭିସିଙ୍କ ଅଫିସ ଘେରାଉ କରିଛନ୍ତି | ଦୁଇମାସର ଦରମା ଓ ପୁନଃ ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ଦାବି କରୁଛନ୍ତି କର୍ମଚାରୀ | Tension prevailed at Rajendra University in Balangir after outsourced employees staged a protest by gheraoing the Vice-Chancellor's office. The agitation erupted following the alleged termination of 82 outsourced workers. The protesting employees are demanding payment of two months' pending salaries and reinstatement to their jobs, leading to unrest on the university campus. #OdishaNews #RajendraUniversity #Balangir #OutsourcingEmployees #EmployeeProtest #JobTermination #UniversityProtest #LabourRights #RajendraUniversity_Balangir #OutsourcingProtest_Odisha #VCOfficeGherao #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: Putin Marks US Independence Day with Message to Trump, Calls for Shared Global Responsibility
results.description: Vladimir Putin, the President of Russia, has said in a message marking the 250th anniversary of US independence that Washington and Moscow, as two major nuclear powers, have a special responsibility to ensure global security and stability. The TASS news agency reported on Saturday, July 4, that Putin congratulated US President Donald Trump on Independence [...] The post Putin Marks US Independence Day with Message to Trump, Calls for Shared Global Responsibility appeared first on Hasht-e Subh .

results.title: Huge crowds mourn Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Iran’s capital
results.description: Thousands of people gathered at Imam Khomeini Grand Mosalla in Tehran on Saturday, July 4, to pay their respects during a public farewell ceremony for Iran 's former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei , who was killed in the US-Israeli airstrikes in February.

results.title: Lebanese Labor Minister tours southern Lebanon to assess impact of Israeli aggression
Venezuela Foreign Minister visits Indian field hospital; expresses gratitude for earthquake relief work
results.description: India relief: Venezuela's Foreign Minister Yvan Gil thanked India after visiting the Army field hospital in Caracas, set up following deadly earthquakes. The mission includes BHISHM Cubes, medical teams, relief supplies and emergency care for survivors.

results.title: Big residential dream returns to Kashi after 30 years, more than 2000 plots of Anand Kashi Yojana will open from August
results.description: After nearly 30 years, Varanasi Development Authority's first integrated gated city Anand Kashi scheme is ready for registration from August 2026. In the first phase, more than 2,000 plots will be developed in 150 acres. With modern amenities, green space and cultural identity of Kashi, the project claims to give a new direction to the residential development of the city.

results.title: TARIL Secures Over ₹1,000 Crore Power Grid Order for Transformer Supply – EQ
results.description: In Short : Transformers and Rectifiers (India) Limited (TARIL) has secured a transformer supply order worth over ₹1,000 crore from Power Grid Corporation of India Limited. The contract strengthens TARIL’s position in the power equipment industry and supports India’s expanding transmission infrastructure, enabling reliable grid modernization, renewable energy integration, and enhanced electricity transmission across the [...]

results.title: Opposition parties take Election Commission’s conduct to the Chief Justice
results.description: Twenty-three parties, including estranged allies Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam and AAP, have written to the Chief Justice over the Election Commission’s conduct and the SIR.
